ralph-wiggum.description: Spawn subagent tasks with automatic recovery steering. Use when launching a subagent that might timeout, get stuck, or needs a structured wrap-up before its hard deadline. Wraps sessions_spawn with a background timer that sends a "wrap it up" steer message at a configurable threshold (default 70% of timeout). Triggers on "spawn with recovery", "ralph wiggum", "smart recovery loop", "spawn with steer timer", or when explicitly wanting timeout-resilient subagent tasks.
